name: Genius Sports Limited
description: Genius Sports Limited is a leading provider of sports data technologies, distribution, and commercialization services. The company connects sports, media, and regulated betting industries by providing official data, technology, and services. It acts as an official data partner to hundreds of sports organizations globally, including the NFL, Premier League, and NCAA, helping them capture, manage, and distribute their live data and video feeds to sportsbooks, media companies, and broadcasters.
